message:
feat(watcher): add file watching with debouncing using fsnotify

Introduces a robust file watcher package built on fsnotify, with
debouncing support to coalesce rapid file changes into single events.

Features:
- EventType enum: Create, Write, Remove, Rename, Chmod, All
- Event struct with Path, Type, IsDir fields
- Debouncing with configurable delay (default 100ms)
- Recursive directory watching option
- Pattern-based filtering (glob patterns)
- Thread-safe start/stop lifecycle

API:
- New(paths, opts...) creates a watcher
- WithDebounce(duration) sets debounce delay
- WithRecursive(bool) enables recursive watching
- WithFilter(patterns) filters events by glob
- Events() returns channel of debounced events
- Errors() returns channel for watch errors
- Start()/Stop() manage watcher lifecycle

Use Cases:
- Hot reload for config files
- Auto-refresh dashboard on pane changes
- Trigger rebuilds on source changes
- Watch beads directory for updates

Adds fsnotify v1.9.0 dependency for cross-platform filesystem events.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
